ogTitle: Joondanna vs Juna Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Joondanna and Juna Downs.
heading: Joondanna vs Juna Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Joondanna, Western Australia and Juna Downs, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Juna Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Joondanna (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Joondanna or Juna Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Joondanna has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Juna Downs scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Joondanna scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Juna Downs scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Joondanna or Juna Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Juna Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
